subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! How blessed, how blessed are those leaves who, in these times, are even as clear verses in the gathering of devoted ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله خوشا خوشا ورقاتی که در این اوقات چون ایات بینات در انجمن قانتات
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @praise and encouragement, @importance of prayer, @firmness in the Covenant
